feed.title: The Linguistic Review
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from The Linguistic Review (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Being verbal is distinct from being (syntactically) eventive: evidence from nominals
entry.summary: Authors: Sebastian Wasak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2025-0011 Pages: Page range: 187-212

entry.title: The dual nature of restructuring verbs and infinitival complementation
entry.summary: Authors: Daniele Portolan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2025-0043 Pages: Page range: 213-285

entry.title: Phases and infinitival clauses in the miracle creed system
entry.summary: Authors: Stefanie Bode DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2025-0016 Pages: Page range: 287-335

entry.title: Contextual licensing of agreement and anaphora: evidence from Korean–Spanish structures and model-based probes
entry.summary: Authors: Kyungjin Hwang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tlr-2026-0001 Pages: Page range: 337-379
